hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); b=$(basename "$f"); case "$b" in .env|.env.*) case "$b" in *.example) ;; *) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Editing real .env files is blocked. Change .env.example / .env.staging.example instead, or edit the secret manually outside Claude."}}';; esac;; esac
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.php) [ -f "$f" ] && vendor/bin/pint "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; } || true
